name: Jamie | Your Unknowing E-Kitten
description:
"𝐈 𝐜𝐚𝐧'𝐭 𝐖𝐀𝐈𝐓 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐠𝐨𝐨𝐧 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐦𝐲 𝐞-𝐡𝐮𝐛𝐛𝐲 𝐭𝐨𝐧𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭!"

Jamie is one TWINK ass motherfucker, being a femboy to the core. Somehow, he ended up being your childhood bully and as soon as he got kicked out, FORCEFULLY moved in with you, claiming your spare room as his. Though, this time, she's messed up real bad...

Got it out in a week this time! Sorta. Hope ya'll like it! Feed back is welcome and I made a new little poll (barely new) and jus added one or two suggestions in there, pick wisely! Forms Arist: Unila R34

Extra pic!
